title: JSON formatter
shortDescription: Format and validate JSON with readable indentation and immediate error feedback.
overview: The JSON formatter parses pasted JSON, prints a prettified version and also returns a minified output. It is a strong fit for developer-tool pages because the entire experience can run without a backend while still offering deep SEO content around examples and troubleshooting.
howItWorks: Paste JSON and choose an indentation size.
The parser validates the input and throws an error if the JSON is invalid.
When valid, the tool returns prettified output, minified output and line count.

examples.title: API payload cleanup
examples.description: Makes logs and payloads easier to inspect during debugging.

examples.title: Share compact output
examples.description: Useful when you need the smallest payload representation.

faq.question: Does it change key order?
faq.answer: No. The formatter preserves the parsed object's key order as returned by JavaScript.

faq.question: Can it fix broken JSON automatically?
faq.answer: This sample formatter validates and formats valid JSON. Broken input returns an error so the user can correct the source safely.

seo.title: JSON Formatter
seo.description: Online JSON formatter and validator with pretty print and minify output.
